summary.key_theme: ServiceNow 憑藉強勁的 AI 產品布局與多項策略性合作夥伴關係，獲得華爾街分析師與市場的高度看好，帶動股價近期顯著上漲。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
bullish.reason: 股價單日跳漲 8.5 %，反映市場對其企業工作流程自動化業務及 AI 成長潛力的強烈信心。

bullish.title: Oppenheimer Reaffirms Bullish Outlook on ServiceNow (NOW) Amid AI Growth and Cognizant Partnership
bullish.reason: Oppenheimer 重申看好立場，強調其 AI 成長動能與 Cognizant 的合作將進一步鞏固市場地位。

bullish.title: Raymond James sees ServiceNow pricing power driving high-margin growth
bullish.reason: 分析師指出公司具備強大的定價能力，預期將推動高利潤率的長期成長。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Expands AI Governance And Public Sector Reach With New Partnerships
bullish.reason: 透過與 IBM 等企業擴大合作，強化 AI 治理能力並拓展公共部門市場，有助於長期營收多元化。

bullish.title: Jefferies says these 4 software stocks screen well in IT exec survey
bullish.reason: Jefferies 的 IT 高管調查顯示 ServiceNow 為最強勁的軟體供應商之一，反映其產品在企業端的高採用率。

bearish.title: AI Concerns Hurt ServiceNow (NOW) Despite Strong Earnings
bearish.reason: 儘管財報表現強勁，但市場對 AI 相關的估值與潛在風險仍存在擔憂，導致部分投資機構採取謹慎態度。

bearish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Dips More Than Broader Market: What You Should Know
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 2.23 %，表現弱於大盤，顯示短期內存在獲利了結賣壓。

neutral.title: Salesforce vs. ServiceNow: What Do Their Revenue Trends Tell Investors?
neutral.reason: 對比 Salesforce 與 ServiceNow 的營收趨勢，僅為客觀的財務數據分析，未對股價產生直接催化作用。

neutral.title: ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅為熱門搜尋股票的盤點報導，提供投資人基本資訊，不構成買賣建議。
